feature.name: Retry backoff policy core
feature.description: Extract urllib3 Retry configuration, exponential backoff, status_forcelist matching, redirect accounting, and increment/history semantics without importing urllib3 or performing HTTP I/O.
included_behaviors: exponential backoff with max cap and redirect reset
Retry-After header parsing with numeric and HTTP-date forms
excluded_behaviors: HTTP connection pools, sockets, TLS, and actual request/response I/O

entanglement.description: Retry couples multi-counter configuration, backoff history semantics, status/method allowlists, redirect vs error history, and typed MaxRetryError reasons.
signals: consecutive error backoff vs redirect history reset
RequestHistory tuple growth on increment branches

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Retry, RequestHistory, ConnectTimeoutError, ReadTimeoutError, MaxRetryError, ResponseError, InvalidHeader
output.signature: Retry(total=10, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None, other=None, **kw)
